intention: 完成最后一次升级/迁移/发布
sentencePatterns: We have already completed the final [upgrade].
Once we complete the final migration, we'll [do next step].
realLifeExamples: We have already completed the final App-Shell upgrade in V2.
The team completed the final migration last sprint.
usageNotes: Use 'final' to mean the last in a planned series. 'last time' is adverbial and cannot directly modify a noun.
productionPrompts: 你们完成了某个系列中最后一次升级，怎么说？
